newsletters.title: Anthropic finds AI's hidden "thinking" layer
newsletters.content:
~[Sign up](https://www.theaivalley.com/)~~ | ~~[Follow us on X](https://twitter.com/heyBarsee)~~ | ~~[Sponsor](mailto:barsee@aivalley.ai)~

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c167fb98-39eb-42d4-a114-56fe02753cac/2__1_-min__2_-min.png?t=1744033912)
Follow image link: (https://www.theaivalley.com/subscribe)
Caption: 

Together with

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/7f8d1c4d-a362-4145-974a-332de927a166/ggeg4g4g4g__1___1_.png?t=1782137995)
Follow image link: (https://ref.viktor.com/vik-aiv-main4)
Caption: 



----------
Howdy, it’s Barsee again.

Happy Wednesday, AI family, and welcome back to AI Valley.

**Today’s climb through the Valley reveals:**

* Anthropic may have found AI's hidden "thinking" layer

* Elon’s xAI rebrands as SpaceXAI, unveils new logo

* AI adoption is accelerating hiring

* OpenAI might be preparing GPT-5.6 for next week's release

* Plus trending AI tools, posts, and resources

Let’s _dive_ into the Valley of AI…


----------

----------
#### **VIKTOR**

## [Show Viktor once. It just does it.](https://ref.viktor.com/vik-aiv-main4)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/4aa41500-120c-4412-a7c2-de509b822ea4/G8_3___A0004___GFT___Run_a_company_faster__easier__and_more_scalable.___Evergreen_TOFU___18.05.26___1200x628__5_.png?t=1783429345)
Caption: Courtesy: Viktor

Viktor is the AI employee that lives in your Slack and Teams.

Show it how you handle reorders. How you draft launch briefs. How AP approvals move through your team. What your standup notes look like. Viktor learns each workflow once and starts doing it for you.

By week three, finance, marketing, eng, and ops are all delegating to the same employee. The question stops being "can Viktor do this?" and becomes "what should we hand off next?"

3,000+ integrations. 15,000+ teams. SOC 2 certified.

$100 in credits, no card.

[Get started free →](https://ref.viktor.com/vik-aiv-main4)

~_*This is sponsored_~


----------

----------
#### **THROUGH THE VALLEY**

Youtube: What’s at the center of Claude’s mind? (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rKV5JcALQoQ)

**1/ Anthropic may have discovered how AI "thinks" before it responds:** Researchers discovered that Claude spontaneously developed an internal "[global workspace](https://www.anthropic.com/research/global-workspace)," a structure similar to one of neuroscience's leading theories of conscious thought. The finding gives Anthropic a new way to inspect the model's hidden reasoning, monitor safety risks, and better understand how advanced AI systems think before they respond. ([see the video explainer](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rKV5JcALQoQ))

**2/ Elon’s xAI rebrands as SpaceXAI, unveils new logo:** Elon Musk's AI company has officially rebranded from xAI to [SpaceXAI](https://www.businessinsider.com/xai-rebrand-spacexai-new-logo-x-handle-spacex-2026-7), completing its integration into SpaceX following the acquisition earlier this year. This move unifies the company's AI, social media, and space businesses under a single brand as it ramps up investments in AI infrastructure and large-scale compute.

**3/ AI adoption is accelerating hiring:** [A new study](https://ramp.com/data/ai-jobs-impact) of more than 21,000 U.S. companies found that businesses investing most heavily in AI increased their workforce by 10% over the past two years, while entry-level hiring rose 12%. The findings suggest AI is helping companies grow faster and create new roles rather than simply replacing existing jobs.

**4/ OpenAI might be preparing GPT-5.6 for next week's release: **[Reports](https://www.testingcatalog.com/openai-might-be-preparing-gpt-5-6-for-next-weeks-release) suggest GPT-5.6 could launch as early as next week, introducing new Sol, Terra, and Luna model tiers alongside a reasoning-effort slider and an "Ultra" mode for tackling more complex tasks. The release could further strengthen OpenAI's lead in coding and advanced reasoning as competition among frontier AI models continues to intensify.


----------

----------
# TRENDING TOOLS


--------------------
* [Hermes](https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/) > An AI agent that learns from every interaction and becomes more personalized over time

* [Cuey](https://cuey.io/compare) > Verify AI responses by instantly comparing answers from ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini side by side

* [FutureSearch](https://futuresearch.ai/) > A frontier AI model designed for forecasting and predicting future events, built on technology similar to ChatGPT and Claude

* [ZCode](https://venturebeat.com/technology/z-ai-launches-zcode-to-challenge-cursor-claude-code-and-github-copilot-in-ai-coding?utm_source=thedeepview&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=ai-adoption-leads-companies-to-hire-more-not-less) > China's Z.ai has launched a coding assistant built to compete with Cursor and Claude Code

* [Acti](https://openacti.com/) > An agentic mobile keyboard that lets you search, automate tasks, and execute commands from anywhere

* [Glaze by Raycast](https://www.glaze.app/) > Build native, offline Mac applications directly from natural language using AI

* [Context.dev](https://www.context.dev/) > A single API to scrape, enrich, and extract structured data from across the web


----------

----------
# WHAT I'M CONSUMING


--------------------
* AI Futures Model: [Timelines & Takeoff](https://www.aifuturesmodel.com/)

* The Robots Are [Here](https://www.chinatalk.media/p/the-robots-are-here)

* The Second Derivative: Why No One [Understands](https://www.groundbrkr.com/p/the-second-derivative-why-no-one) the AI Boom


----------

----------
# THE VALLEY GEMS


--------------------
__What’s trending on social today:__

Tweet:  (https://twitter.com/RoundtableSpace/status/2073840584955994527?s=20)


----------

----------
# THAT’S ALL FOR TODAY


--------------------
Thank you for reading today’s edition. That’s all for today’s issue.

newsletters.title: A Tale of Two Models
newsletters.content:
Plus: Why Anthropic is getting into drug discovery  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by8iLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MH0=

Context Window

https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jb250ZXh0LXdpbmRvdyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxfQ==


A TALE OF TWO MODELS https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jb250ZXh0LXdpbmRvdy9hLXRhbGUtb2YtdHdvLW1vZGVscyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoyfQ==


PLUS: WHY ANTHROPIC IS GETTING INTO DRUG DISCOVERY https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jb250ZXh0LXdpbmRvdy9hLXRhbGUtb2YtdHdvLW1vZGVscyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjozfQ==

by Every Staff https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9ARXZlcnklMjBTdGFmZiIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo0fQ==

Midjourney/Every illustration.

Anthropic put out two models this week—one we’d been missing, and one we could skip. Fable 5 https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiYWJvdXQ6YmxhbmsiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6NX0= came back online on Thursday, and it couldn’t come back soon enough. Two days earlier, Sonnet 5 landed with a shrug: Katie Parrott https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9Aa2F0aWUucGFycm90dDEyIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjZ9’s Vibe Check https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by92aWJlLWNoZWNrL3Nvbm5ldC01IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjd9 finds a Goldilocks model pitched for everyone that impresses no one, with a cheaper, faster, or smarter option for nearly every job. Yet while Fable can spin up a working app from a single prompt (it rebuilt our document editor Proof https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wcm9vZmVkaXRvci5haSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo4fQ== in about three hours), AI still can’t reliably make a PowerPoint deck. Mike Taylor https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9AbWlrZV8yMTE0IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjl9 and the consulting team needed a 24-skill pipeline at $62 a deck to automate it https://every., and still wouldn’t recommend it for most teams. Regardless, the Every team still can’t get enough https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jb250ZXh0LXdpbmRvdy9jb2RleC1pbi1wcmFjdGljZSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxMX0= of Codex. We’ll be back in your inbox on Tuesday.—Kate Lee https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9Aa2F0ZV8xNzY3IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjEyfQ==

Was this newsletter forwarded to you? Sign up https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9hY2NvdW50IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjEzfQ== to get it in your inbox.

----------------------------------------


KNOWLEDGE BASE

“Vibe Check: Sonnet 5—A Model Pitched for Everyone Impresses No One” https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by92aWJlLWNoZWNrL3Nvbm5ldC01IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjE0fQ== by Katie Parrott/Vibe Check: Katie and the Every team put Anthropic’s new Sonnet 5 through its paces and came away unconvinced. Pitched as the Goldilocks model—smart enough for hard work, cheap and fast enough for daily use—it lands as none of those next to Opus 4.8, Fable 5, and GPT-5.5. Read this for where Sonnet 5 fits, and why the team keeps reaching for other models.

“AI Could Do Anything. Then It Met PowerPoint.” https://every. by Mike Taylor/Also True for Humans: PowerPoint has been a fixture of work for decades, and AI still can’t conquer it in one shot. Mike and the consulting team found that Codex and Claude Code build slides from scratch well but falter against a company’s own templates. For most teams, the hardest part is figuring out what to say, and AI can’t do that for you. Read this for an honest account of what AI can and can’t do with slides.

“Codex in Practice” https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jb250ZXh0LXdpbmRvdy9jb2RleC1pbi1wcmFjdGljZSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxNn0= by Laura Entis/Context Window: Laura Entis https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9AbGF1cmFfMjdiYmFmXzEiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTd9 rounds up how people across Every have built their own Codex workspaces—Dan Shipper https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb2RlbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI4LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9AZGFuc2hpcHBlciIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxOH0=’s long-running router threads, Katie’s file system, head of growth Austin Tedesco https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQSBUYWxlIG9mIFR3byBNb

newsletters.title: Vibe Check: Sonnet 5—A Model Pitched for Everyone Impresses No One
newsletters.content:
Anthropic’s new model can draft, code, and analyze competently, but every use case has a cheaper, faster, or smarter alternative  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogU29ubmV0IDXigJRBIE1vZGVsIFBpdGNoZWQgZm9yIEV2ZXJ5b25lIEltcHJlc3NlcyBObyBPbmUiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI5LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by8iLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MH0=

Vibe Check

https://every.


VIBE CHECK: SONNET 5—A MODEL PITCHED FOR EVERYONE IMPRESSES NO ONE https://every.


ANTHROPIC’S NEW MODEL CAN DRAFT, CODE, AND ANALYZE COMPETENTLY, BUT EVERY USE CASE HAS A CHEAPER, FASTER, OR SMARTER ALTERNATIVE https://every.

by Katie Parrott https://every.

Midjourney/Every illustration.

Was this newsletter forwarded to you? Sign up to get it in your inbox.



----------------------------------------



Anthropic has historically pitched Sonnet as its “just right” model: smarter than Haiku, cheaper and faster than Opus—enough intelligence for getting work done, at a price that won’t make your accounting team cry.

Sonnet 5, released on Tuesday, arrived with an even bigger promise. Anthropic says it’s more agentic, closer to Opus, and better suited to the inchoate work people hand to AI all day.

After testing it across Every, we came away with a less flattering impression. Sonnet 5 is capable. It can produce decent prose, handle structured knowledge work, and make progress on some coding tasks. But over and over, the same question came up: When would we pick Sonnet 5 over the models already in the rotation?

We get into all of it in our Vibe Check, including:

https://every.
Start free trial https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogU29ubmV0IDXigJRBIE1vZGVsIFBpdGNoZWQgZm9yIEV2ZXJ5b25lIEltcHJlc3NlcyBObyBPbmUiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI5LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9zdWJzY3JpYmU_aGFzaD0lcmVjaXBpZW50Lmhhc2glXHUwMDI2cHVibGljYXRpb249dmliZS1jaGVja1x1MDAyNnNvdXJjZT1lbWFpbF9wb3N0X3BheXdhbGwiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6Nn0=



WHAT IS INCLUDED IN A SUBSCRIPTION?

Daily insights from AI pioneers + early access to powerful AI tools

https://every.

newsletters.title: The Fable 5 official comeback
newsletters.content:
~[Sign up](https://www.theaivalley.com/)~~ | ~~[Follow us on X](https://twitter.com/heyBarsee)~~ | ~~[Sponsor](mailto:barsee@aivalley.ai)~

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c167fb98-39eb-42d4-a114-56fe02753cac/2__1_-min__2_-min.png?t=1744033912)
Follow image link: (https://www.theaivalley.com/subscribe)
Caption: 

Together with

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/b5b7eff6-7711-473a-946e-148bdbf0ee1a/Katalyze_Ink_Logo__2___1_.png?t=1783003290)
Follow image link: (https://katalyzeai.com/?utm_source=ai+valley&utm_medium=nl&utm_campaign=launch)
Caption: 



----------
howdy, it’s Barsee again.

happy thursday, AI family, and welcome back to AI Valley.

**here are the biggest things worth knowing today:**

* The Fable 5 official comeback

* Anthropic is taking AI into the laboratory

* Google launched two new models

* OpenAI wants the U.S. government to own part of the company

* Meta wants to power the next generation of AI companies

* Plus trending AI tools, posts, and resources

Let’s _dive_ into the Valley of AI…


----------

----------
#### **KATALYZE**

## [The agentic infrastructure five of the top twenty pharma companies already run.](https://katalyzeai.com/?utm_source=ai+valley&utm_medium=nl&utm_campaign=launch)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/52511e72-355c-4470-b884-f352aaaac0f3/founders_copy__1_.jpg?t=1783003277)
Follow image link: (https://katalyzeai.com/?utm_source=ai+valley&utm_medium=nl&utm_campaign=launch)
Caption: Courtesy: Katalyze

In regulated pharma manufacturing, the work between a molecule and a finished medicine still moves by hand. Deviation investigations drag on for weeks. Scientists lose days to fragmented systems instead of advancing the science. 

Katalyze raised $10.5M to deploy agentic infrastructure. It connects the systems you already run, grounds everything in your own data, and puts expert-designed agents on the difficult work - finding root cause, catching process faults, and drafting regulatory-ready reports. 

Teams see plant throughput up 25%, batch release 40% faster, and investigations that once took months close in 45 minutes. It already runs at sites inside five of the top twenty global pharma companies, helping deliver over 10 million doses in just two years. Every answer is traceable to its source, built for the world's most regulated environments. 

[See how it works.](https://katalyzeai.com/?utm_source=ai+valley&utm_medium=nl&utm_campaign=launch)

~_*This is sponsored_~


----------

----------
#### **THROUGH THE VALLEY**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/bc00d414-20f6-48ad-b6fb-8b9e1012c055/www-cdn.anthropic__9___1_.png?t=1783003580)
Caption: Claude Sonnet 5

**1/ The Fable 5 official comeback: **The U.S. Commerce Department has [lifted](https://www.anthropic.com/news/redeploying-fable-5) export restrictions on Fable and Mythos after Anthropic agreed to strengthen security monitoring, coordinate with the government on future model releases, and report malicious activity. The decision restores global access while signaling a new era of government oversight for frontier AI models. You can access the model across the [Claude Platform](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/about-claude/models/introducing-claude-fable-5-and-claude-mythos-5) and [Claude AI](https://claude.ai/new). It features new safeguards and is rolling out to tools like AWS.

**2/ Anthropic just made advanced AI agents much more affordable: **The company also launched [Claude Sonnet 5](https://www.testingcatalog.com/anthropic-launches-claude-sonnet-5-model-on-claude-and-apis/), a new model that brings stronger reasoning, coding, tool use, and autonomous task execution to all Claude users and developers. Anthropic says the model delivers performance approaching Opus 4.8 at a significantly lower cost, making powerful AI agents more accessible for everyday applications.

**3/ Anthropic is taking AI into the laboratory:** The company launched [Claude Science](https://www.testingcatalog.com/early-look-at-anthropics-claude-science-app-for-researchers/), an AI-powered research platform built for life sciences that integrates with existing lab infrastructure and supports more than 60 specialized scientific tools. The system automates complex analyses, manages computing workflows, and helps researchers accelerate discoveries while improving reproducibility and data validation.

**4/ Google launched two new models:** The company [launched](https://www.testingcatalog.com/google-launches-nano-banana-2-lite-and-gemini-omni-flash/) Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash, two new media models for creating and editing images and videos through the Gemini app and API. Nano Banana 2 Lite can generate images in under four seconds at a fraction of the cost, while Gemini Omni Flash enables conversational video generation and editing for $0.10 per second.

**5/ OpenAI wants the U.S. government to own part of the company: **The company has proposed giving the federal government a [5% stake](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/07/02/openai-proposes-us-government-own-5percent-stake-to-address-political-blowback.html?utm_source=tldrnewsletter), worth an estimated $42.6 billion, as part of a broader plan to align leading AI developers with Washington. CEO Sam Altman says the proposal would give the public a direct financial stake in AI's long-term success while easing growing political pressure on the industry.

**6/ Meta wants to power the next generation of AI companies:** The company is reportedly [planning](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-07-01/meta-is-building-a-cloud-business-to-sell-excess-ai-compute?accessToken=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzb3VyY2UiOiJTdWJzY3JpYmVyR2lmdGVkQXJ0aWNsZSIsImlhdCI6MTc4Mjk3NDg0MSwiZXhwIjoxNzgzNTc5NjQxLCJhcnRpY2xlSWQiOiJUSEVOTzNUOU5KTFQwMCIsImJjb25uZWN0SWQiOiI0NUZGMzc2RThENDg0NzYxQTkwQ0JEMzc4OTMzQjg2RiJ9.kpiVb0aBaxaGvO7WPEUSvdMTw10YAUjtWL4lBYHetpI&utm_source=tldrnewsletter) a cloud infrastructure business that would sell access to AI computing power and foundation models built on its massive data center network. If launched, it would position Meta to compete with providers like AWS Bedrock and CoreWeave while creating a new revenue stream from its growing AI infrastructure.


----------

----------
# TRENDING TOOLS


--------------------
* [ChatGPT](https://x.com/ChatGPTapp/status/2055317612687675545?s=20) > For Pro users, OpenAI has introduced a new personal finance experience that lets you securely connect financial accounts, track spending, and ask questions about your financial data

* [Acti](https://www.openacti.com/?ref=producthunt) > Turns your phone's keyboard into an AI agent that can instantly fetch links, documents, schedules, profiles, and meeting links without ever leaving the text field

* [Browserbase Agents](https://www.browserbase.com/blog/introducing-browserbase-agents) > Automates browser tasks with a single prompt or API call, running inside a fully hosted browser environment

* [xAI Voice Agent Builder](https://x.com/xai/status/2072342803787702422) > xAI has launched a no-code platform that lets anyone build natural, human-like voice agents powered by Grok Voice

* [Firecrawl](https://x.com/firecrawl/status/2072367412029079987?s=20) > An always-on web search that continuously monitors the internet and instantly notifies you or your AI agent when new content appears

* [Cursor for iOS](https://cursor.com/blog/ios-mobile-app) > Lets you run cloud or desktop coding agents directly from your iPhone, making it possible to build software from anywhere.


----------

----------
# WHAT I'M CONSUMING


--------------------
* [Rise](https

newsletters.title: Our 13 best Fable 5 prompts
newsletters.content:
​

( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/e0hph7h734n3egu8h2/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50bw== )

We’re so back.

The morning afterFable 5 vanished ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/7qh7h8h92z4282hzh6/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jb250ZXh0LXdpbmRvdy9mYWJsZS1kaXNhYmxlZA== ) from our model selectors on June 12, Every CEO Dan Shipper ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/owhkhqhwmo8mn2bvhr/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9AZGFuc2hpcHBlcg== ) asked the team what they would use instead. Cora ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/z2hghnhe2wd27lfph0/aHR0cHM6Ly9jb3JhLmNvbXB1dGVy ) general manager Kieran Klaassen returned toOpus 4.8 ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/p8heh9h4wx7wdpfqh3/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by92aWJlLWNoZWNrL29wdXMtNC04LXZpYmVjaGVjaw== ). Monologue ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/6qheh8hl8o28wqiohk/aHR0cHM6Ly9tb25vbG9ndWUudG8= ) general managerNaveen Naidu ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/58hvh7hgd79dovf6h4/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9AbmF2ZWVuXzY4MDQ= ) and engineerAndrey Galko ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/qvh8h7hdmn6m2vilhk/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9AZGV2dHdv ) went back toCodex ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/g3hnh5hm8pz8oofrh9/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9ndWlkZXMvY29kZXgtZm9yLWtub3dsZWRnZS13b3Jr ). Andrey summed up the new arrangement in three words: “I miss Fable.”

He had company. People missed Fable badly enough that someone on X said there was no point in working ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/3ohphkh35zd59dfrhn/aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9tYXR0c2h1bWVyXy9zdGF0dXMvMjA2NTYyMDcyMjE4NjE3ODcxNQ== ) until it returned. We sped through the stages of Fable grief ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/7qh7h8h92z4282hzh6/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jb250ZXh0LXdpbmRvdy9mYWJsZS1kaXNhYmxlZA== ), then used the forced separation to think about what we would give the model if we got another chance.

Now our long nightmare is over. The company restored access on Wednesday, July 1 at 3:30 ET, and said that usage will be fully included under Claude subscription plans until July 7, after which point access will be metered through the Claude API.

If you’re anything like us, you’ve been keeping a “when Fable comes back” list. We turned ours into a Fable 5 Prompt Library ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/n2hohvhv9ro95nh6hg/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9wL2NsYXVkZS1mYWJsZS01LXByb21wdC1saWJyYXJ5 ). It has:

* 13 prompts the Every team uses for overnight work, product builds, research, writing, loops, and dynamic workflows
* A quick way to decide when Fable is worth the cost and when another model will do
* The recording and transcript from our two-hour Fable 5 Power User Camp

We’ve done enough mourning. Fable is back, our lists are long, and it’s time to give the best model we’ve tested the work we’ve been saving for it.

-->Get the prompt library → ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/n2hohvhv9ro95nh6hg/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9wL2NsYXVkZS1mYWJsZS01LXByb21wdC1saWJyYXJ5 )
Get the prompt library → ( https://every.to/p/claude-fable-5-prompt-library )Can’t get enough Fable? Check out more of Every’s coverage:

* ​Live stream: Dan Shipper rips Fable tokens from vacation in Cabo ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/48hvhehmdg2dqraxh7/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj12aUlTbmU0ZUxFWSZ0PTNz ) (YouTube)
* ​”Vibe Check: Fable Is the Best Coding Model in the World ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/wnh2hghq2go2vqb7hx/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by92aWJlLWNoZWNrL2FudGhyb3BpYy1teXRob3Mtb3VyLWZhYmxlLXZpYmUtY2hlY2s= ) (Vibe Check)
* ​”The Moral of Fable” ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/reh8hohmlx5lvwh2h6/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jaGFpbi1vZi10aG91Z2h0L3RoZS1tb3JhbC1vZi1mYWJsZQ== ) (Chain of Thought)
* ​”How to Get the Most Out of Fable 5” ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/08hwh9h26z76wzclh5/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jb250ZXh0LXdpbmRvdy9ob3ctdG8tZ2V0LXRoZS1tb3N0LW91dC1vZi1mYWJsZS01 ) (Context Window)

You received this email because you signed up for emails from Every ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/mvup95x2pgf5hqd324lcmhrxo9em9u3hdevoe/e0hph7h734n3egu8h2/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50bw== ). No longer interested in receiving emails from us? Click here to

newsletters.content:
Our team has customized workspaces to get the most out of Codex. Pick one and dive in.  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQ29kZXggaW4gUHJhY3RpY2UiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI2LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by8iLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MH0=

Context Window

https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQ29kZXggaW4gUHJhY3RpY2UiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI2LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jb250ZXh0LXdpbmRvdy9jb2RleC1pbi1wcmFjdGljZT9tZXRlcmVkX3BheXdhbGw9NCIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxfQ==


CODEX IN PRACTICE https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQ29kZXggaW4gUHJhY3RpY2UiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI2LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jb250ZXh0LXdpbmRvdy9jb2RleC1pbi1wcmFjdGljZT9tZXRlcmVkX3BheXdhbGw9NCIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoyfQ==


OUR TEAM HAS CUSTOMIZED WORKSPACES TO GET THE MOST OUT OF CODEX. PICK ONE AND DIVE IN. https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQ29kZXggaW4gUHJhY3RpY2UiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI2LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jb250ZXh0LXdpbmRvdy9jb2RleC1pbi1wcmFjdGljZT9tZXRlcmVkX3BheXdhbGw9NCIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjozfQ==

by Laura Entis https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQ29kZXggaW4gUHJhY3RpY2UiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI2LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jb250ZXh0LXdpbmRvdy9jb2RleC1pbi1wcmFjdGljZT9tZXRlcmVkX3BheXdhbGw9NCIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo0fQ==

Midjourney/Every illustration.

We’re here to talk about Codex but before we get into it, we need to acknowledge the impending return https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQ29kZXggaW4gUHJhY3RpY2UiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI2LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9BbnRocm9waWNBSS9zdGF0dXMvMjA3MjEwNjE1MTg5MDgwOTM0MSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo1fQ== of Fable 5 https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQ29kZXggaW4gUHJhY3RpY2UiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI2LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by92aWJlLWNoZWNrL2FudGhyb3BpYy1teXRob3Mtb3VyLWZhYmxlLXZpYmUtY2hlY2siLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6Nn0=, Anthropic’s Mythos-grade model that’s slated to be available again today. Every’s head of tech consulting, Mike Taylor https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQ29kZXggaW4gUHJhY3RpY2UiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI2LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9AbWlrZV8yMTE0IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjd9, is at the AI Engineer World’s Fair https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQ29kZXggaW4gUHJhY3RpY2UiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI2LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9oYW1tZXJfbXQvc3RhdHVzLzIwNzIzNTIzNDk1MDM1ODI1MTMiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6OH0=, where Anthropic’s Thariq Shihipar just gave a keynote titled “A Field Guide to Fable.” In the words of staff writer Katie Parrott https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiQ29kZXggaW4gUHJhY3RpY2UiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzI2LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9rcGxpa2V0aGViaXJkL3N0YXR1cy8yMDcyMTExMjc2ODI2NjkzNjc0IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjl9, “Our long national nightmare is almost over.”
